current.note: Spec-driven development harness with git worktree isolation, Kanban dashboard, and multi-agent support across Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and OpenCode. The 'spec → plan → tasks → next → review → accept → merge' loop is the most concrete implementation of the supervisory engineering middle-loop pattern in the KB.

previous.note: Aggregates real-time community signal across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, GitHub, TikTok, and Polymarket into a single ranked summary. The multi-source parallel synthesis pattern maps directly onto how this KB works — just with a different ingestion trigger.
